item.text: A useful public resource exists: TraitGym publishes precomputed model predictions as well as labels. I will use only prediction/features files, never the benchmark label file. Because the mixed test appears large enough to contain the full TraitGym collections, any labeled row overlapping the supplied tuples is excluded (in practice likely all of them), so there is no TraitGym label training leakage.
